title: Majestic-class heavy cruiser

The '''''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser''' was a compact but powerful [[Warship/Legends|warship]] built under the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Class Modernization Program]].

==Characteristics==
With 30 heavy [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons, 20 laser cannons, 20 [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], 8 [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] tubes, 4 [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors,<ref name="CTD" /> and more than 20 [[antimissile octet]]s,<ref name="Tyrant" /> these ships were capable of engaging both enemy [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. ''Majestic''-class heavy cruisers were incredibly durable; their thick armor and [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] were equal to the previous generation of [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]. This armor and shield power gave them the ability to close with the enemy to exchange close-range fire. Like other New Class ships, the ''Majestic'' also boasts superior fire control systems compared to contemporary [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ships with heavy guns of the same power. With this ability, the ''Majestic'' can score as many hits at long range as an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer can at medium ranges and can remain at that range as long as it has space to evade the Imperial ship.<ref name="CTD" />

These ships were equipped with Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]], capable of 90-second spin-up times.<ref name="Tyrant" /> They carried a crew of 4,050; 640 troops; and enough [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]] for 5 months of operation.<ref name="CTD" /> The ''Majestic''-class was also capable of carrying five squadrons of starfighters, often including [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] and [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing]] starfighters for screening and escort duties as well as [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wings]] for strike missions.<ref name="Tyrant" />

Following New Class practice, the basic hull design of the ''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser was derived from that of the [[Defender-class assault carrier|''Defender''-class assault carrier]].<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The only official image of the ''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser is found in the RPG sourcebook ''Cracken's Threat Dossier'', but the image looks nothing like that of the ''Defender''-class carrier, which is supposed to be built on the same hull, according to the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] novels, on which ''Cracken's Threat Dossier'' is based. Because of this, many fans believe that this picture cannot be an accurate representation of the ship. In the Black Fleet Crisis novels, ships of this class are called battlecruisers.

''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' published in 2008 retconned the ship ''[[Indomitable (Majestic-class)|Indomitable]]'' from the novel ''[[Shield of Lies]]'' set in 16/17 ABY to be the same ''Indomitable'' which is mentioned in the novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' set in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].
